member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.GetUsers
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all registered users.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.Register(SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.RegisterDTO)
member.summary: Registers a new user account.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.Login(SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.LoginDTO)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns an access token + refresh token.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.Logout
member.summary: Logs out the current user (not implemented by server side).

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.GenerateNewAccessToken(SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.TokenModel)
member.summary: Refreshes an expired access token using a valid refresh token.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.AstronautsController.GetAllAstronauts
member.summary: Retrieves all astronauts from the database.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.AstronautsController.AddAstronaut(SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.AddAstronautRequestDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new astronaut.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.AstronautsController.GetAstronautById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a single astronaut by its unique ID.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.AstronautsController.DeleteAstronaut(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an astronaut by its ID.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.AstronautsController.UpdateAstronaut(System.Int32,SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.AddAstronautRequestDTO)
member.summary: Fully updates an existing astronaut.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.MissionAstronautsController.GetAllMissionAstronauts
member.summary: Gets all mission-astronaut relationships.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.MissionAstronautsController.GetMissionAstronautById(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a specific mission-astronaut relationship by composite key.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.MissionAstronautsController.AddMissionAstronaut(SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.AddMissionAstronautRequestDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new mission-astronaut relationship.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.MissionAstronautsController.DeleteMissionAstronaut(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a mission-astronaut relationship.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.MissionsController.GetAllMissions
member.summary: Retrieves all missions with their associated rocket.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.MissionsController.GetMissionById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a single mission by its unique ID, including the related rocket.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.MissionsController.AddMission(SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.AddMissionRequestDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new mission.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.MissionsController.UpdateMission(System.Int32,SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.AddMissionRequestDTO)
member.summary: Fully updates an existing mission.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.MissionsController.DeleteMission(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a mission by its ID.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.RocketsController.GetAllRockets
member.summary: Gets all rockets with their associated agency.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.RocketsController.GetRocketById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a single rocket by ID, including its agency.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.RocketsController.AddRocket(SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.AddRocketRequestDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new rocket.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.RocketsController.UpdateRocket(System.Int32,SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.AddRocketRequestDTO)
member.summary: Updates an existing rocket.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.WebApi.Controllers.RocketsController.DeleteRocket(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a rocket by ID.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.Web.Controllers.AgenciesController.GetAllAgencies
member.summary: Retrieves all agencies from the database.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.Web.Controllers.AgenciesController.AddAgency(SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.AddAgencyRequestDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new agency.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.Web.Controllers.AgenciesController.GetAgencyById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a single agency by its unique ID.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.Web.Controllers.AgenciesController.DeleteAgency(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an agency by its ID.

member.name: M:SpaceMissionsTracker.Web.Controllers.AgenciesController.UpdateAgency(System.Int32,SpaceMissionsTracker.Core.DTOs.AddAgencyRequestDTO)
member.summary: Fully updates an existing agency.
